message:
test(fr-conformance): cross-impl DUMP/RESTORE round-trip gate for STREAM (br-frankenredis-m17o)

Add live_redis_stream_dump_restore_roundtrip_matches_upstream
mirroring the STRING round-trip test, driving both directions
against the vendored redis-server oracle:

  1. Our Store::dump_key on a stream with four deterministic
     entries (single-field, multi-field, binary, fixed IDs) →
     `RESTORE key 0 <payload>` on the oracle. Oracle's XLEN
     and XRANGE - + must echo the original entries (ids +
     field/value bytes + order).
  2. Oracle XADD → DUMP → our store.restore_key → store.xrange
     echoes the original entries (ids + field bytes + order).

Exercises fr_persist::encode_upstream_stream_listpacks3_payload
(s5su-e / br-frankenredis-6zk9) and the type-21 RESTORE path
(s5su-d / br-frankenredis-qi6z) against the upstream oracle.

No fr-runtime or fr-store changes required — the encoder +
decoder already cover the type-21 shape for stream entries.

fr-conformance 182 passed, 0 failed under STRICT mode;
`cargo clippy --tests -- -D warnings` clean.

Closes br-frankenredis-m17o.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
